testcase.name: verifyGrade8CourseSelection

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //h2[normalize-space()='Introduction to Force']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'cursor-pointer') or contains(@class,'rounded')] (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.39.0', revision: '126f156aee' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 143.0.7499.170, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 143.0.7499.192 (be2c1f4fd45..., userDataDir: C:\Users\HARISH~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52974}, goog:processID: 33840, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52974/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 143.0.7499.170, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 1311039e34c6a3863f7ee5faf1494c0a
